meta.defaultTitle: Tru Dallas Detox | Medical Detox & Addiction Treatment Dallas TX
meta.defaultDescription: Medical detox and addiction treatment in Dallas TX. Most PPO plans accepted. Same-day admission available.

process.quote: "The fear of withdrawal keeps more people sick than withdrawal itself ever could. We built our detox protocol specifically to change that."
process.author: Matt Hooten, LPC-S

testimonial.quote: “The fear of withdrawal keeps more people sick than withdrawal itself ever could. We built our detox protocol specifically to change that.”
testimonial.author: Mitchell Naficy, MD

insuranceLogos.heading: Your Insurance Is Probably Already on This List
insuranceLogos.body: Most PPO plans cover the full cost of treatment — and we’ll confirm yours in minutes. Check your provider below, or call us and we’ll walk you through exactly what you’re covered for, at no cost and with no obligation.

accommodations.heading1: Imagine Waking Up and Not Needing It Anymore
accommodations.body1: That life exists. It’s being lived right now by people who once felt exactly the way you do. We bridge the distance between where you are today and a life free from addiction — with compassionate therapy, peer support, and clinical care that actually works.
accommodations.heading2: Expert Care. Real Compassion. Zero Judgment.
accommodations.body2: Our therapists don’t just treat symptoms — they get to know you. In a private, calming environment surrounded by people on the same path, you’ll find that recovery isn’t something that happens to you. It’s something you build, with the right team beside you.

facilities.name: Tru Dallas Detox
facilities.description: From medically supervised detox to full residential care and aftercare, Tru Dallas handles every stage of recovery under one roof. Personalized treatment plans, 24/7 clinical support, and same-day admission — built for people who are ready.

facilities.name: Maverick Behavioral Health
facilities.description: Maverick was built around a simple belief: bold, individualized care changes lives. Their programs combine 1-on-1 therapy, dual diagnosis treatment, and luxury accommodations — designed for clients who need focused, private care without compromise.

facilities.name: Oceans Luxury Rehab
facilities.description: Nestled on the shores of Orange County, Oceans offers an oceanfront setting where discreet, upscale detox and residential treatment meet a genuinely calming environment for healing. Private accommodations, gourmet dining, and 24/7 medical care — recovery with no corners cut.
